Oil-Immersed Distribution Transformer

S20 Oil-Immersed Energy-Saving Transformer

Oil-immersed distribution transformer with reduced losses compared with earlier S11/S13 designs.

Get a QuoteProduct Inquiry

Product Tags

S20Oil-immersedDistribution
Back to product matrix

Overview

The brochure describes S20 as a new energy-saving transformer based on the S11 energy-saving transformer. It uses high-quality silicon steel sheets and a 45-degree full miter, stepped five-stage core joint structure to reduce no-load loss and no-load current.

Applications

  • Distribution grids
  • Energy-saving grid renovation
  • Industrial and commercial distribution

Key Features

  • No-load loss reduced by 30-40% compared with S11/S13 references in brochure
  • Load loss reduced by 20-30% compared with S11/S13 references in brochure
  • High cost performance
  • Convenient maintenance and user wiring
  • Fully sealed and maintenance-free

Product Advantages

  • High-voltage coil made of oxygen-free copper wire
  • Low-voltage coil above 200 kVA uses copper foil
  • S22 grade 1 oil-immersed distribution transformer can be produced according to user requirements

Technical Parameters

Typical technical data from brochure, based on S13-630/10 sample.

Rated capacity630 kVA
Vector groupDyn11
HV voltage10000 V
LV voltage400 V
Voltage regulation range+/-2 x 2.5%
Number of phases3
Load loss6200 W
No-load loss570 W
No-load current0.35%

Performance Indicators

Sample data only. Final design can be customized.

Performance indicatorsTo be confirmed by model
